ability.name: Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP)
ability.description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP HEAD request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses curl instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

steps.description: Checks inter-network connectivity by pinging a target host on the LAN. The target IP is defined by the fact 'lan.target.ip'.
steps.name: LAN Connectivity Check (Ping)

output.stdout: PING 192.168.1.2 (192.168.1.2) 56(84) bytes of data.From 192.168.1.3 icmp_seq=1 Destination Host UnreachableFrom 192.168.1.3 icmp_seq=2 Destination Host UnreachableFrom 192.168.1.3 icmp_seq=3 Destination Host Unreachable--- 192.168.1.2 ping statistics ---3 packets transmitted, 0 received, +3 errors, 100% packet loss, time 2048mspipe 3LAN_REACHABLE:false

steps.description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP HEAD request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses curl instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.
steps.name: Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP)

steps.command: output=$(hping3 --icmp -i u100000 -c 100 203.0.113.1 2>&1); echo "$output"; loss=$(echo "$output" | grep -oP "\d+(?=% packet loss)"); [ -n "$loss" ] && [ "$loss" -lt 95 ] || exit 1
steps.plaintext_command: output=$(hping3 --icmp -i u100000 -c 100 203.0.113.1 2>&1); echo "$output"; loss=$(echo "$output" | grep -oP "\d+(?=% packet loss)"); [ -n "$loss" ] && [ "$loss" -lt 95 ] || exit 1
steps.name: ddos-icmp

attack.technique_name: Network Denial of Service - Direct Network Flood
